name: American Credit - Credit Repair Centers
description_short: American Credit - Credit Repair Centers is a credit repair provider based in El Segundo, California. Rated 3.2/5 with 45 Google reviews, reflecting mixed customer satisfaction.
description_long:
American Credit - Credit Repair Centers is a credit repair provider serving clients in El Segundo, California. Carrying a 3.2/5.0 Google rating from 45 reviews, American Credit - Credit Repair Centers has an mixed reputation among consumers in the El Segundo area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

American Credit - Credit Repair Centers specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in El Segundo, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. American Credit - Credit Repair Centers operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the El Segundo, California area who are considering American Credit - Credit Repair Centers should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
